title: Sunipia salweenensis
taxonomy: Sunipia salweenensis is classified within the family of flowering plants, Orchidaceae. The genus Sunipia belongs to the subtribe Coelogyneinae. Sunipia salweenensis is a rare orchid species found in Myanmar. This species is often characterized by its unique and delicate flowers. Sunipia salweenensis is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.

This plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its potential in treating conditions such as skin infections and wounds.
